evals.expected_output: Overview of tunnels, bandwidth, and security alerts
expectations: Calls list_tunnels to show connection status
Presents a clear summary of network health

evals.prompt: How much bandwidth am I using?
evals.expected_output: Bandwidth stats for the requested time period
expectations: Presents bandwidth in human-readable units (Mbps, GB)
Shows per-tunnel breakdown if multiple tunnels exist

evals.expected_output: Recent security events and threat summary
expectations: Calls /api/stats/alerts with a recent time range
Groups alerts by category (dns_block, security_event, port_scan, etc.)
Calls list_tunnels and checks is_connected / connection_status
Clearly shows which tunnels are connected and which are not
Suggests dig @10.10.10.10 to verify DNS is working through the VPN
